import pandas as pd
from datetime import date

# Load raw data
cases = locals().get('var_functions.query_db:24', [])
assignment_counts = locals().get('var_functions.query_db:20', [])

print('=== DEBUG DATA OVERVIEW ===', flush=True)
print(f'Total cases: {len(cases)}')
print(f'Total assignment summaries: {len(assignment_counts)}')

# Convert cases
if cases:
    df_cases = pd.DataFrame(cases)
    print(f'\nCases columns: {list(df_cases.columns)}')
    print(f'Cases sample:\n{df_cases.head()}')
    
    # Parse dates
    df_cases['createddate_parsed'] = pd.to_datetime(df_cases['createddate'])
    df_cases['closeddate_parsed'] = pd.to_datetime(df_cases['closeddate'])
    df_cases['createddate_date'] = df_cases['createddate_parsed'].dt.date
    
    print(f'\nDate range in data: {df_cases["createddate_date"].min()} to {df_cases["createddate_date"].max()}')
    
    # Filter by date range (May 2 to Sept 2, 2023)
    start_date = date(2023, 5, 2)
    end_date = date(2023, 9, 2)
    mask = (df_cases['createddate_date'] >= start_date) & (df_cases['createddate_date'] <= end_date)
    df_date_filtered = df_cases[mask]
    
    print(f'\nCases in 4-month range: {len(df_date_filtered)}')
    if len(df_date_filtered) > 0:
        print(f'Sample cases in range:\n{df_date_filtered.head()}')
        
        # Clean owner IDs and count ALL cases per agent
        df_date_filtered['ownerid_clean'] = df_date_filtered['ownerid'].astype(str).str.strip().str.strip('#')
        df_date_filtered['caseid_clean'] = df_date_filtered['id'].str.strip()
        
        agent_counts_all = df_date_filtered.groupby('ownerid_clean').size().reset_index(name='total_cases')
        agent_counts_all = agent_counts_all.sort_values('total_cases', ascending=False)
        
        print(f'\nAGENTS WITH TOTAL CASES IN RANGE:')
        print(agent_counts_all.to_string(index=False))
        
        # Identify agents with more than 1 case
        agents_multi_total = set(agent_counts_all[agent_counts_all['total_cases'] > 1]['ownerid_clean'])
        print(f'\nAgents with >1 case total: {agents_multi_total}')
        
        # Process assignment counts
        if assignment_counts:
            df_counts = pd.DataFrame(assignment_counts)
            print(f'\nAssignment counts columns: {list(df_counts.columns)}')
            print(f'Assignment counts sample:\n{df_counts.head()}')
            
            df_counts['caseid_clean'] = df_counts['caseid__c'].str.strip()
            df_counts['assignment_count'] = df_counts['assignment_count'].astype(int)
            
            # Get cases with exactly 1 assignment
            single_assign_cases = set(df_counts[df_counts['assignment_count'] == 1]['caseid_clean'])
            print(f'Cases with single assignment: {len(single_assign_cases)}')
            
            # Filter to non-transferred cases
            df_non_transferred = df_date_filtered[df_date_filtered['caseid_clean'].isin(single_assign_cases)]
            
            print(f'\nNon-transferred cases in range: {len(df_non_transferred)}')
            if len(df_non_transferred) > 0:
                print(f'Sample non-transferred:\n{df_non_transferred.head()}')
                
                # Count non-transferred cases per agent
                agent_non_transferred_counts = df_non_transferred.groupby('ownerid_clean').size().reset_index(name='non_transferred_cases')
                print(f'\nAGENTS WITH NON-TRANSFERRED CASES:')
                print(agent_non_transferred_counts.to_string(index=False))
                
                # Calculate handle times
                df_non_transferred['handle_time_hours'] = (df_non_transferred['closeddate_parsed'] - df_non_transferred['createddate_parsed']).dt.total_seconds() / 3600
                
                # Average handle time per agent (non-transferred cases only)
                agent_handle_times = df_non_transferred.groupby('ownerid_clean').agg({
                    'caseid_clean': 'count',
                    'handle_time_hours': 'mean'
                }).reset_index()
                agent_handle_times.columns = ['ownerid', 'case_count', 'avg_handle_time']
                
                print(f'\nHANDLE TIMES BY AGENT (non-transferred cases only):')
                print(agent_handle_times.to_string(index=False, float_format='%.4f'))
                
                # Filter to agents with >1 case TOTAL
                qualified_agents = agent_handle_times[agent_handle_times['ownerid'].isin(agents_multi_total)]
                print(f'\nQUALIFIED AGENTS (processed >1 case total):')
                print(qualified_agents.to_string(index=False, float_format='%.4f'))
                
                if not qualified_agents.empty:
                    best_agent = qualified_agents.loc[qualified_agents['avg_handle_time'].idxmin()]
                    result = best_agent['ownerid']
                    print(f'\n>>> WINNER: {result} <<<')
                else:
                    result = None
                    print(f'\nNo qualified agents found')
            else:
                result = None
                print(f'\nNo non-transferred cases found')
        else:
            result = None
            print(f'\nNo assignment count data')
    else:
        result = None
        print(f'\nNo cases in date range')
else:
    result = None
    print(f'\nNo cases data')

print(f'\n__RESULT__:')
print(json.dumps(result))"}

function.arguments:
{"db_name": "support", "query": "
WITH date_range_cases AS (
  SELECT 
    id,
    createddate,
    closeddate,
    TRIM(BOTH '#' FROM ownerid) as ownerid
  FROM "Case"
  WHERE createddate >= '2023-05-02' 
    AND createddate <= '2023-09-02'
    AND closeddate IS NOT NULL 
    AND closeddate != 'None'
),
assignment_counts AS (
  SELECT 
    caseid__c,
    COUNT(*) as assignment_count
  FROM casehistory__c
  WHERE field__c = 'Owner Assignment'
  GROUP BY caseid__c
),
non_transferred_cases AS (
  SELECT 
    drc.id,
    drc.createddate,
    drc.closeddate,
    drc.ownerid,
    ac.assignment_count
  FROM date_range_cases drc
  JOIN assignment_counts ac ON drc.id = ac.caseid__c
  WHERE ac.assignment_count = 1
),
agent_case_counts AS (
  SELECT 
    ownerid,
    COUNT(*) as total_cases
  FROM date_range_cases
  GROUP BY ownerid
  HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
),
agent_handle_times AS (
  SELECT 
    ntc.ownerid,
    COUNT(*) as non_transferred_cases,
    AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (ntc.closeddate::timestamp - ntc.createddate::timestamp))/3600.0) as avg_handle_time_hours
  FROM non_transferred_cases ntc
  WHERE ntc.ownerid IN (SELECT ownerid FROM agent_case_counts)
  GROUP BY ntc.ownerid
)
SELECT 
  ownerid,
  avg_handle_time_hours
FROM agent_handle_times
WHERE avg_handle_time_hours IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY avg_handle_time_hours ASC
LIMIT 1;
"}

{"code": "import json
import pandas as pd
from datetime import date

# Load all data
print('Loading all case data...')
# Need to query all cases in range and ALL case history to identify non-transferred cases
all_cases = locals().get('var_functions.query_db:58', [])
casehistory_all = locals().get('var_functions.query_db:6', [])

print(f'Cases in date range: {len(all_cases)}')
print(f'All case history records: {len(casehistory_all)}')

if all_cases and casehistory_all:
    # Convert to DataFrames
    df_cases = pd.DataFrame(all_cases)
    df_history = pd.DataFrame(casehistory_all)
    
    # Clean IDs
    df_cases['ownerid_clean'] = df_cases['ownerid'].astype(str).str.strip().str.strip('#')
    df_cases['caseid_clean'] = df_cases['id'].str.strip()
    df_history['caseid_clean'] = df_history['caseid__c'].str.strip()
    
    # Filter for Owner Assignment events only
    df_owner_assignments = df_history[df_history['field__c'] == 'Owner Assignment'].copy()
    
    # Count assignments per case
    assignment_counts = df_owner_assignments.groupby('caseid_clean').size().reset_index(name='assignment_count')
    
    # Merge cases with assignment counts
    df_merged = df_cases.merge(assignment_counts, on='caseid_clean', how='left')
    df_merged['assignment_count'] = df_merged['assignment_count'].fillna(0).astype(int)
    
    print(f'Assignment count distribution:')
    print(df_merged['assignment_count'].value_counts().sort_index())
    
    # Count ALL cases per agent (for >1 case filter)
    agent_all_cases = df_merged.groupby('ownerid_clean').size().reset_index(name='total_cases')
    agents_multi_total = set(agent_all_cases[agent_all_cases['total_cases'] > 1]['ownerid_clean'])
    
    print(f'\nAgents with >1 case total: {len(agents_multi_total)}')
    print(f'Agents: {sorted(agents_multi_total)}')
    
    # Filter for non-transferred cases only (assignment_count == 1)
    df_non_transferred = df_merged[df_merged['assignment_count'] == 1].copy()
    
    print(f'\nNon-transferred cases: {len(df_non_transferred)}')
    
    if len(df_non_transferred) > 0:
        # Parse dates and calculate handle times
        df_non_transferred['createddate_parsed'] = pd.to_datetime(df_non_transferred['createddate'])
        df_non_transferred['closeddate_parsed'] = pd.to_datetime(df_non_transferred['closeddate'])
        df_non_transferred['handle_time_hours'] = (df_non_transferred['closeddate_parsed'] - df_non_transferred['createddate_parsed']).dt.total_seconds() / 3600
        
        # Group by agent and calculate average handle time
        agent_stats = df_non_transferred.groupby('ownerid_clean').agg({
            'caseid_clean': 'count',
            'handle_time_hours': 'mean'
        }).reset_index()
        agent_stats.columns = ['ownerid', 'case_count', 'avg_handle_time']
        
        print(f'\nAll agent stats (non-transferred cases):')
        print(agent_stats.to_string(index=False, float_format='%.4f'))
        
        # Filter to agents who processed more than one case TOTAL
        qualified_agents = agent_stats[agent_stats['ownerid'].isin(agents_multi_total)]
        
        print(f'\nQualified agents (>1 case total):')
        print(qualified_agents.to_string(index=False, float_format='%.4f'))
        
        if not qualified_agents.empty:
            best_agent = qualified_agents.loc[qualified_agents['avg_handle_time'].idxmin()]
            result = best_agent['ownerid']
            print(f'\n=== RESULT: Agent {result} ===')
            print(f'Average handle time: {best_agent["avg_handle_time"]:.4f} hours')
            print(f'Non-transferred cases used: {best_agent["case_count"]}')
        else:
            result = None
            print(f'\nNo qualified agents found')
    else:
        result = None
        print(f'\nNo non-transferred cases found')
else:
    result = None
    print(f'\nMissing data')

print('__RESULT__:')
print(json.dumps(result))"}

function.arguments:
{"db_name": "support", "query": "
WITH date_range_cases AS (
  SELECT 
    id,
    createddate,
    closeddate,
    TRIM(BOTH '#' FROM ownerid) as ownerid,
    TRIM(BOTH '#' FROM id) as case_id_clean
  FROM "Case" 
  WHERE createddate >= '2023-05-02' 
    AND createddate <= '2023-09-02'
    AND closeddate IS NOT NULL 
    AND closeddate != 'None'
),
assignment_counts AS (
  SELECT 
    TRIM(BOTH '#' FROM caseid__c) as caseid_clean,
    COUNT(*) as assignment_count
  FROM casehistory__c
  WHERE field__c = 'Owner Assignment'
  GROUP BY TRIM(BOTH '#' FROM caseid__c)
),
non_transferred_cases AS (
  SELECT 
    drc.id,
    drc.createddate,
    drc.closeddate,
    drc.ownerid,
    ac.assignment_count
  FROM date_range_cases drc
  JOIN assignment_counts ac ON drc.case_id_clean = ac.caseid_clean
  WHERE ac.assignment_count = 1
),
agent_stats AS (
  SELECT 
    ownerid,
    COUNT(*) as case_count,
    AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closeddate::timestamp - createddate::timestamp))/3600.0) as avg_handle_time_hours
  FROM non_transferred_cases
  WHERE ownerid = '005Wt000003NDqDIAW'
  GROUP BY ownerid
)
SELECT * FROM agent_stats;
"}

function.arguments:
{"db_name": "support", "query": "
SELECT 
  c.id,
  c.createddate,
  c.closeddate,
  TRIM(BOTH '#' FROM c.ownerid) as ownerid,
  COALESCE(ac.assignment_count, 0) as assignment_count
FROM "Case" c
LEFT JOIN (
  SELECT TRIM(BOTH '#' FROM caseid__c) as caseid_clean, COUNT(*) as assignment_count
  FROM casehistory__c
  WHERE field__c = 'Owner Assignment'
  GROUP BY TRIM(BOTH '#' FROM caseid__c)
) ac ON TRIM(BOTH '#' FROM c.id) = ac.caseid_clean
WHERE c.createddate >= '2023-05-02' 
  AND c.createddate <= '2023-09-02'
  AND TRIM(BOTH '#' FROM c.ownerid) = '005Wt000003NDqDIAW'
  AND c.closeddate IS NOT NULL 
  AND c.closeddate != 'None'
ORDER BY c.createddate;
"}

function.arguments:
{"db_name": "support", "query": "
SELECT 
  TRIM(BOTH '#' FROM c.ownerid) as ownerid,
  COUNT(*) as total_cases,
  SUM(CASE WHEN ac.assignment_count = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as non_transferred_cases
FROM "Case" c
LEFT JOIN (
  SELECT TRIM(BOTH '#' FROM caseid__c) as caseid_clean, COUNT(*) as assignment_count
  FROM casehistory__c
  WHERE field__c = 'Owner Assignment'
  GROUP BY TRIM(BOTH '#' FROM caseid__c)
) ac ON TRIM(BOTH '#' FROM c.id) = ac.caseid_clean
WHERE c.createddate >= '2023-05-02' 
  AND c.createddate <= '2023-09-02'
  AND c.closeddate IS NOT NULL 
  AND c.closeddate != 'None'
GROUP BY TRIM(BOTH '#' FROM c.ownerid)
HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
ORDER BY total_cases DESC;
"}

function.arguments:
{"code": "import json
import pandas as pd

# Load raw data
cases = locals().get('var_functions.query_db:66', [])
casehistory = locals().get('var_functions.query_db:64', [])

print('=== DEBUG: Raw Data Analysis ===')
print(f'Cases count: {len(cases)}')
print(f'Case history count: {len(casehistory)}')

# Convert to DataFrames
df_cases = pd.DataFrame(cases)
df_history = pd.DataFrame(casehistory)

if len(cases) > 0:
    print('\n=== Cases Data ===')
    print(df_cases.to_string(index=False))
    
    # Clean IDs
    df_cases['ownerid_clean'] = df_cases['ownerid'].str.strip()
    df_cases['caseid_clean'] = df_cases['id'].str.strip()
    df_cases['ownerid_no_hash'] = df_cases['ownerid'].str.strip().str.strip('#')
    
    print('\n=== Cases by Agent (all cases) ===')
    cases_by_agent = df_cases.groupby('ownerid_clean').agg({
        'caseid_clean': 'count',
        'id': lambda x: list(x)
    }).reset_index()
    cases_by_agent.columns = ['ownerid', 'case_count', 'case_ids']
    print(cases_by_agent.to_string(index=False))
    
    print('\n=== Cases by Agent (no hash) ===')
    cases_by_agent_no_hash = df_cases.groupby('ownerid_no_hash').agg({
        'caseid_clean': 'count',
        'id': lambda x: list(x)
    }).reset_index()
    cases_by_agent_no_hash.columns = ['ownerid_no_hash', 'case_count', 'case_ids']
    print(cases_by_agent_no_hash.to_string(index=False))
    
    # Check which agents have >1 case
    multi_case_agents = cases_by_agent_no_hash[cases_by_agent_no_hash['case_count'] > 1]
    print(f'\n=== Agents with >1 case ===')
    print(multi_case_agents.to_string(index=False))

if len(casehistory) > 0:
    print('\n=== Case History Data ===')
    print(df_history.to_string(index=False))
    
    # Clean case IDs in history
    df_history['caseid_clean'] = df_history['caseid__c'].str.strip()
    
    print('\n=== Assignment counts ===')
    assignment_counts = df_history.groupby('caseid_clean').agg({
        'field__c': 'count',
        'createddate': lambda x: list(x)
    }).reset_index()
    assignment_counts.columns = ['caseid', 'assignment_count', 'assignment_dates']
    print(assignment_counts.to_string(index=False))
    
    # Get cases with exactly 1 assignment
    single_assign = assignment_counts[assignment_counts['assignment_count'] == 1]
    print(f'\n=== Single-assignment cases: {len(single_assign)} ===')
    print(single_assign.to_string(index=False))
    
    # Check intersection
    cases_with_single_assign = set(single_assign['caseid'])
    all_case_ids = set(df_cases['caseid_clean'])
    
    print(f'\n=== Check: Do case IDs match? ===')
    print(f'Cases from history: {len(cases_with_single_assign)}')
    print(f'Cases from main table: {len(all_case_ids)}')
    print(f'Intersection: {len(cases_with_single_assign.intersection(all_case_ids))}')
    
    # Find cases that don't intersect
    print(f'Cases in history but not in main: {cases_with_single_assign - all_case_ids}')
    print(f'Cases in main but not in history: {all_case_ids - cases_with_single_assign}')

result = 'debug_complete'
print('__RESULT__:')
print(json.dumps(result))"}
